name: big-number
description: Evaluate and improve big-number slides — hero metric with evidence support (waterfall, before/after, driver breakdown)
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with proof structure that withstands CFO scrutiny, not just directional claims

prompts.text: Build a big-number slide showing 300% ROI from a SaaS analytics platform with value driver breakdown proving the math
Build a big-number slide showing $8M cost savings from a procurement optimization with waterfall showing each savings source
Build a big-number slide showing 94% customer retention rate with benchmark comparison vs industry average of 82%
Build a big-number slide showing 60% reduction in time-to-hire (from 45 days to 18 days) with before/after comparison and timeline trend
Build a big-number slide showing $128M annual revenue exceeding plan by 8% with quarterly build-up showing Q1-Q4 contribution
Build a big-number slide showing NPS score of 72 with industry benchmark bar (SaaS avg 36) and quarterly trend line from 55 to 72
Build a big-number slide showing 450 employees with growth trajectory (+120 in 18 months) and breakdown by department
Build a big-number slide showing 23% market share gained in 2 years, with competitor comparison showing we overtook #2 player
Build a big-number slide showing 99.97% uptime (only 13 min downtime in 30 days) with SLA target comparison and incident count trend
Build a big-number slide showing 40% carbon reduction vs 2020 baseline with pathway breakdown: energy efficiency 15%, renewables 18%, offsets 7%
